text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key area is text understanding, where computers can read and interpret written information. Another important use is translation, allowing machines to convert text from one language to another, like from English to Spanish. NLP also powers sentiment analysis, which is used to detect emotions in text, such as whether a customer review is positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions and providing support in a natural, helpful way.
